arts.ttl: Serie A Liveblog: Milan vs. Lazio, Roma vs. Como, Bologna vs. Cagliari, Genoa vs. Empoli
Empoli and Genoa look to climb the table
arts.sum: Empoli have lost their last four league games, and could lose five matches in a row in Serie A for the first time since the period between June and September 2023 (six in that case). This is a match between the team that has scored the fewest goals in the first half (Genoa, five) and the club that has netted the fewest goals in the second half (Empoli, seven) in Serie A this season.
